name: Ai Interview Copilot — Live capture
description: Records the LeetCode tab (video + tab audio) and editor snapshots to your AiInterviewCopilot server.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* wss://127.0.0.1:* wss://localhost:* https://leetcode.com https://*.leetcode.com; object-src 'self'
